mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To provide high-quality sustainable products and services that generate shared value for our clients, collaborators, and the environment, leading the transformation towards a circular economy in the industry.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be the leading company in Latin America for B2B sustainable solutions, recognized for our innovation, environmental commitment, and operational excellence, inspiring the industry towards more responsible practices.

sustainability.title: Commitment to Sustainability
sustainability.subtitle: Concrete initiatives that demonstrate our leadership in environmental responsibility

circular.title: Circular Economy
circular.description: Utilization of 95% of by-products through sustainable valorization and transformation processes

renewable.title: Renewable Energy
renewable.description: 60% of our operations run on solar energy and certified renewable sources

water.title: Water Management
water.description: Treatment and recirculation system that reduces water consumption by 40%

biodiversity.title: Biodiversity Protection

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Testimonials from companies that trust our sustainable solutions

testimonial1.name: Carlos Mendoza
testimonial1.text: Green Prod & Sustainable S.A.C has been a fundamental strategic partner. Their bio-inputs have improved our productivity by 30% while reducing environmental impact. The quality and service are exceptional.

testimonial2.name: María Fernández
testimonial2.text: The traceability and certifications of their products allow us to meet the highest ESG standards. Their commitment to the circular economy is a key differentiator in our supply chain.

testimonial3.name: Roberto Silva
testimonial3.text: We have been working with Green Prod for 5 years and the consistency in quality is impressive. Their sustainable procurement solutions have opened new demanding international markets for us.
